originContent: 搜索cloudflare workers VLESS 可以找到自建免费节点的教程,不需要任何费用,不需要服务器,但是需要点动手能力.
translatedContent: Searching for cloudflare workers VLESS can find tutorials for self-built free nodes, no cost, no server needed, but requires some hands-on ability.

originContent: 不定期更新便宜的直连VPN机场,最实惠的中转VPN梯子,最稳定的IEPL专线代理节点.
translatedContent: Irregularly updated cheap direct VPN airports, the most affordable transit VPN ladders, the most stable IEPL dedicated proxy nodes.

originContent: 根据需求选择,稳定性:IEPL>中转>直连，多备用几家机场,反正很多就几块钱1年,防止在高峰时段失联......
translatedContent: Choose according to demand, stability: IEPL>Transit>Direct, keep several airports as backup, anyway, many only cost a few yuan for 1 year, to prevent disconnection during peak hours.....
